rows.label: qev085801_MSG0001
rows.name: Someone has arrived mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085801_MSG0002
rows.name: Man, you guys are a lifesaver.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085801_MSG0003
rows.name: You have to pass through a dangerous zone on the way, so I wanted a highly skilled team to take this on.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085801_MSG0004
rows.name:
A Pathfinder team getting stranded due to a lack of supplies...
It's a rather foolish story.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085801_MSG0005
rows.name: Whose team is it?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085801_MSG0006
rows.name: Believe it or not, it's Lao's.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085801_MSG0007
rows.name:
Lao-san's? I can't believe it.
He seems like such a sharp guy.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085801_MSG0008
rows.name:
Exactly mo.
He feels just as razor-sharp as Tatsu mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085801_MSG0009
rows.name: Well, the man himself is definitely capable, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085801_MSG0010
rows.name: Is something wrong?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085801_MSG0011
rows.name: Lately, that bastard's been wandering off, leaving the mission to his team members a lot.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085801_MSG0012
rows.name: Goodness knows where he's off goofing around.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085801_MSG0019
rows.name: Worry

rows.label: qev085801_MSG0020
rows.name: Ask if he has some sort of circumstances.

rows.label: qev085801_MSG0021
rows.name: Dissatisfaction

rows.label: qev085801_MSG0022
rows.name: Criticize Lao for being a terrible person.

rows.label: qev085801_MSG0013
rows.name: If he did, you'd think he'd at least consult with me about it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085801_MSG0014
rows.name: It cannot be helped since old man lacks respect mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085801_MSG0015
rows.name:
I see, I lack respect...
Wait, what did you just say?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085801_MSG0016
rows.name:
Well, he can't exactly argue with that.
I'll have to give him a piece of my mind myself.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085801_MSG0017
rows.name: Lao's issues aside, we can't just abandon his team.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085801_MSG0018
rows.name:
Yeah, hurry up.
I'm counting on you.[ST:wait ]
